projectDescription: An open-source hotel booking platform that lets travelers search properties by destination and dates, compare pricing, and book with magic-link or social authentication.
keyFeatures: Destination search powered by Algolia with city typeahead
Hotel availability search with geo-radius filtering (250 km)
Dynamic pricing engine with early-bird, last-minute, length-of-stay, day-of-week, and extra-guest modifiers
Interactive map view of nearby properties
Fullscreen hero UI with destination photography
publicApiSurface: GET /api/query — hotel availability search (lat, lon, checkin, checkout, adults, children, rooms)
POST /api/auth/[...all] — Better Auth unified auth handler
HotelSearchInput — TypeScript interface for search parameters
HotelSearchResult — TypeScript interface for search results
ResolvedRoom — pricing-resolved room result with applied_modifiers
resolveSearchResults() — pricing calculator returning cheapest room per hotel
